title: justicia ankaratrensis
intro: Justicia ankaratrensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as the Madagascar Justicia or Ankaratrensis. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Justicia ankaratrensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve the leaves, which are used to make teas or infusions, while the roots may be used in more concentrated extracts or decoctions.
